message:
fix: skip errored delegations in primitive execution loop

Malformed delegations (missing goal) already get error tool results
added to resultByCallId, but the primitive loop didn't skip them,
causing "Unknown primitive: delegate" errors. Now checks
resultByCallId.has(call.id) before attempting primitive execution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
